clauses.statement: Codex and explicitly enabled Claude Code connectors implement the existing five-method runtime adapter contract and are registered only at the Guarded Run composition root.

test_refs.case: PRC-S-1 Codex connector conforms to probe/start/status/result/cancel
PRC-S-7 production composition preserves an explicitly injected coordinator

clauses.statement: Implementation runs only in the managed worktree with write capability, review runs read-only with a distinct identity and session, and malformed or stale results never become completion.

test_refs.case: PRC-S-4 review uses read-only sandbox, separate identity and a separate provider session
PRC-S-3 typed provider failure survives status normalization

clauses.statement: Fake conformance tests cover both providers, typed failures, cancellation and structured results, while a credential-free production probe smoke verifies the installed Codex surface.

test_refs.case: PRC-S-3 probe failures normalize auth, quota, permission and unavailable states
PRC-S-6 production smoke probe is typed and never requires credentials
GAH-S-3 provider fallback tries persisted adapters in order and retains failed attempts for audit
